sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: NextEra Energy and NextEra Energy Partners to meet with investors in early to mid-March
feed.summary: NextEra Energy (NEE) and NextEra Energy Partners (NEP) announced that their senior management teams will hold investor meetings in early to mid-March. They plan to discuss long-term growth rate expectations, reaffirming those presented during their Q4 2023 earnings call on January 25, 2024. Investors can access related news releases and presentation materials on their respective company websites.

feed.title: BNY Mellon Municipal Bond Infrastructure Fund, Inc. (NYSE DMB) Announces Distribution
feed.summary: BNY Mellon Municipal Bond Infrastructure Fund, Inc. (NYSE DMB) has announced a distribution. The brief announcement was disseminated via Reuters and Refinitiv. This news is relevant for investors tracking the fund's financial disbursements.

feed.title: HYATT REPORTS FIRST QUARTER 2024 RESULTS
feed.summary: Hyatt Hotels Corporation reported strong first quarter 2024 results, with comparable system-wide RevPAR increasing by 5.5% and net rooms growth of approximately 5.5%. The company achieved a record gross fee revenue of $262 million, expanded its pipeline to 129,000 rooms, and saw World of Hyatt membership grow to 46 million members. Hyatt also made significant progress on asset dispositions, realizing $1.5 billion of gross proceeds towards its $2.0 billion asset sell-down commitment by the end of 2024.

feed.title: HARD Stock Fund Price and Chart — AMEX:HARD
feed.summary: This article provides an overview of the Simplify Commodities Strategy No K-1 ETF (HARD), including its price, chart, key financial statistics like AUM and dividend yield, and detailed information about its investment strategy. HARD invests in commodity futures contracts to perform during inflationary periods, using an active management style and a Cayman Islands subsidiary to avoid K-1 payments. The article also includes technical analysis, seasonal trends, and a comprehensive FAQ section about ETFs and HARD's specific characteristics.

feed.title: Garden Stage (Nasdaq:GSIW) - Stock Analysis
feed.summary: This report provides a stock analysis of Garden Stage Limited (Nasdaq:GSIW), a financial services provider in Hong Kong. It details the company's financial overview, including its market cap, recent price performance, and fundamental statistics like revenue and earnings. The article also highlights risk factors, recent news and updates, shareholder returns, and price volatility, noting the company's underperformance compared to its industry and the broader US market.

feed.title: GRPM Stock Fund Price and Chart — AMEX:GRPM
feed.summary: This article provides comprehensive information on the Invesco S&P MidCap 400 GARP ETF (GRPM), including its price performance, key statistics, holdings, and an overview of its investment strategy. GRPM tracks a mid-cap index of growth stocks with quality and value characteristics, utilizing growth and quality & value z-scores for stock selection. The fund has an expense ratio of 0.35% and pays dividends with a yield of 1.17%.

feed.title: GMAR Stock Fund Price and Chart — CBOE:GMAR
feed.summary: The article provides a detailed overview of the GMAR FT Vest U.S. Equity Moderate Buffer ETF - March, including its price, performance metrics, key statistics like AUM and expense ratio, and investment strategy. It explains how the fund uses options to moderate losses on SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust (SPY) shares over a one-year period, while outlining the upside limitations. The piece also includes an overview of its holdings, technical analysis, seasonal trends, and answers frequently asked questions about ETFs and GMAR specifically.

feed.title: Marathon Petroleum Corp. stock outperforms competitors on strong trading day
feed.summary: Marathon Petroleum Corp. (MPC) saw its stock rise by 4.15% to $220.77 on Wednesday, marking its third consecutive day of gains. This performance outpaced the broader market, with the S&P 500 Index and the Dow Jones Industrial Average also finishing higher. The strong trading day highlighted MPC's positive momentum against its competitors.

feed.title: Gartner, Inc. (IT) Investigation: Bronstein, Gewirtz & Grossman, LLC Encourages Investors to Contact the Firm to Learn More About the Investigation
feed.summary: Bronstein, Gewirtz & Grossman, LLC is investigating potential claims against Gartner, Inc. (NYSE:IT) following a significant stock price drop. The investigation stems from Gartner's fourth quarter 2025 financial results and its 2026 outlook, which reported revenue and adjusted earnings forecasts below analyst expectations, causing the stock to fall over 20%. The firm encourages investors who purchased Gartner securities to contact them to learn more about the investigation.

feed.title: Bank of America 5.74% position disclosed in Galapagos (NASDAQ: GLPG)
feed.summary: Bank of America Corporation and its affiliates have disclosed a 5.74% position in Galapagos (NASDAQ: GLPG), crossing the 5% major shareholding threshold under Belgian transparency rules. This stake, comprising both voting rights and equivalent financial instruments, was first surpassed on February 26, 2026, and adjusted by March 2, 2026. The holdings are distributed across various BofA entities and include instruments like rights to recall, physical call options, and swaps.

feed.title: Westinghouse Air Brake (NYSE: WAB) exec reports phantom stock transactions
feed.summary: Pascal Schweitzer, President Transit at Westinghouse Air Brake Technologies (NYSE: WAB), reported transactions involving phantom stock units and common shares. He exercised phantom stock units, which were settled for cash, and acquired then disposed of 4,678 common shares back to the company at $263.015 per share. Following these transactions, Schweitzer directly holds 19,941 common shares, with phantom stock awards vesting 33.33% annually starting from March 2024.

feed.title: Verisign (NASDAQ: VRSN) legal chief sells 498 shares in March
feed.summary: Verisign's EVP, General Counsel, and Secretary, Thomas C. Indelicarto, sold a total of 498 shares of company common stock on March 3, 2026, through open-market transactions. The sales were executed at two different price points: 332 shares at $235.00 each and 166 shares at $225.34 each. Following these sales, Indelicarto's direct holdings in Verisign common stock amount to 40,028.258 shares, which includes recently acquired dividend equivalent restricted stock units.

feed.title: [144] F5, INC. SEC Filing
feed.summary: This article reports on an SEC Form 144 filing by F5, Inc. (FFIV). The filing indicates a proposed sale of 3755 shares of common stock with an aggregate market value of $1,057,182.70, acquired via Restricted Stock Units on February 1, 2026. The transaction is being handled by Morgan Stanley Smith Barney LLC and is neutral in sentiment and market impact.

feed.title: Raymond James Lures Advisors With No Cross-Selling
feed.summary: Raymond James is attracting financial advisors by promoting its lack of cross-selling requirements, a stance that CEO Paul Shoukry and Private Client Group President Tash Elwyn believe differentiates the firm. Advisors reportedly tell Raymond James that forced cross-selling in previous roles prioritizes firm profitability over client interests. This strategy is paying off, with the firm experiencing strong recruiting momentum and investing $1.1 billion in technology, including a new AI agent for advisors.

feed.title: Sundar Pichai and Pichai Family Foundation sell GOOG shares (GOOG)
feed.summary: Sundar Pichai and the Pichai Family Foundation have reported multiple 10b5-1 sales of Alphabet Inc. (GOOG) Class C common stock. Sundar Pichai sold 32,500 shares per trade, while the Pichai Family Foundation sold 4,000 shares per trade, across several dates between December 17, 2025, and February 18, 2026. The filing indicates specific proceeds for each transaction.

feed.title: AT&T Named Founding Partner & Official Connectivity Provider of Tgl Presented by Sofi
feed.summary: AT&T has joined TGL presented by SoFi as a Founding Partner and Official Connectivity Partner, aiming to enhance the fan experience for the primetime men's team golf league. This partnership will provide innovative connectivity solutions for broadcast, in-venue interactions, and digital engagement features like the Player Connect interview and Matchup Live. AT&T's involvement underscores a significant technological advancement for TGL as it prepares for its playoffs and continues to redefine golf viewing.

feed.title: Charles River (NYSE: CRL) EVP adds 25 shares in open-market buy
feed.summary: Joseph W. LaPlume, Executive Vice President of Corporate Strategy & Development at Charles River Laboratories (NYSE: CRL), purchased 25 shares of the company's common stock. The acquisition was an open-market buy at $174.54 per share on March 3, 2026, increasing his direct holdings to 27,448 shares. This insider transaction was reported in a Form 4 SEC filing, indicating a neutral impact and sentiment.

feed.title: Honest Company (HNST) innovation chief sells 73,685 shares in open market
feed.summary: Stephen Winchell, Chief Innovation Officer of Honest Company (HNST), sold 73,685 shares of the company's common stock in an open-market transaction. The shares were sold at a weighted average price of $2.84, with individual trades ranging from $2.83 to $2.87. Following this sale, Winchell directly owns 517,466 shares, which includes 444,422 restricted stock units.

feed.title: Sundar Pichai (NASDAQ: GOOG) files Form 144 listing Class C share sales
feed.summary: Sundar Pichai and the Pichai Family Foundation have filed Form 144, detailing proposed sales of Class C common shares of Alphabet Inc. (NASDAQ: GOOG) under 10b5-1 plans. The filing lists multiple planned transactions between 2025 and 2026, including recurring share disposals by both Sundar Pichai and the Foundation. For example, on February 18, 2026, Sundar Pichai planned to sell 32,500 shares for $9,877,260.25, and the Pichai Family Foundation planned to sell 4,000 shares for $1,215,662.80.

feed.title: Quest Diagnostics (NYSE: DGX) EVP sells shares and disposes stock for taxes
feed.summary: Catherine T. Doherty, EVP of Quest Diagnostics (DGX), sold 632 shares of common stock for $207.73 per share and disposed of 648 shares at $204.86 to cover tax obligations from restricted share unit vesting. These transactions were part of a pre-arranged Rule 10b5-1 trading plan. After these disposals, Doherty directly holds 67,122 shares and indirectly holds 4,502 shares through a company 401(k) plan.

feed.title: HP (NYSE: HPQ) awards 157,729 RSUs to Chief Commercial Officer McQuarrie
feed.summary: HP Inc. (NYSE: HPQ) has awarded its Chief Commercial Officer, David P. McQuarrie, 157,729 restricted stock units (RSUs) on March 2, 2026. These RSUs represent a contingent right to receive HP common stock, with half vesting on March 2, 2027, and the remaining half on September 2, 2027. Dividend-equivalent units will also accrue on these RSUs.

feed.title: Quest Diagnostics (NYSE: DGX) CEO discloses 10,000-share stock sale
feed.summary: Quest Diagnostics CEO and President J. E. Davis reported two stock transactions involving company common stock. He disposed of 2,968 shares to cover tax obligations from a restricted share unit grant and sold 10,000 shares in an open-market transaction under a pre-arranged Rule 10b5-1 sales plan. Following these transactions, he directly holds 117,185 Quest Diagnostics shares.

feed.title: Quest Diagnostics (NYSE: DGX) SVP sells 526 shares in plan
feed.summary: Michael E. Prevoznik, SVP and General Counsel of Quest Diagnostics (NYSE: DGX), sold 526 shares of company stock at $207.73 per share under a Rule 10b5-1 sales plan on March 3. Additionally, 288 shares were disposed of at $204.86 each on March 2 to cover tax obligations from vested restricted share units. Following these transactions, Prevoznik directly holds 37,557 shares and indirectly holds 5,737 shares through company plans.

feed.title: Amgen Keeps Quarterly Dividend at $2.52 a Share, Payable June 5 to Holders of Record May 15
feed.summary: Amgen Inc. announced it will maintain its quarterly dividend at $2.52 per share. The dividend is scheduled to be paid on June 5, 2026, to shareholders of record as of May 15, 2026. This news comes amidst recent adjustments in price targets by several financial firms, with ratings ranging from "Sell" to "Overweight."

feed.title: Diamondback adjusts Viper Energy (VNOM) stake after March secondary sale
feed.summary: Diamondback Energy has amended its ownership filing for Viper Energy (VNOM) following a secondary share sale in March 2026. The company sold 12,391,304 Viper Class A shares at $45.69 each, with underwriters having a 30-day option for additional shares. Despite the sale, Diamondback, through its direct and subsidiary holdings (including exchangeable Class B shares and New OpCo units), remains a dominant shareholder, beneficially owning 142,666,789 Class A shares, representing 42.4% of Viper's outstanding Class A stock as of March 4, 2026.

feed.title: ROK Rockwell Automation NYSE down 3.78% after-hours 04 Mar 2026: AI demand supports recovery
feed.summary: Rockwell Automation (ROK) saw its stock dip 3.78% after-hours despite reporting solid Q1 fiscal 2026 revenue and an EPS beat, as a mixed margin outlook concerned investors. The company's strong fundamentals, including high free cash flow and ROE, support its premium valuation, while its focus on industrial AI and digital twin capabilities positions it for future growth. Meyka AI gives ROK a BUY rating, projecting a quarterly target of $433.45 but a lower yearly forecast of $362.81, highlighting both opportunities and risks like valuation sensitivity and cyclical demand.

feed.title: MCDONALDS : RBC gives a Neutral rating
feed.summary: RBC analyst Logan Reich has maintained a "Neutral" rating for McDonald's Corporation, keeping the target price unchanged at USD 330. This information was published on March 4, 2026, at 04:36 pm EST by MarketScreener.

feed.title: Profit drops as Global Water (NASDAQ: GWRS) ramps 2025 investment
feed.summary: Global Water Resources (NASDAQ: GWRS) reported a 5.8% increase in 2025 full-year revenue to $55.8 million, driven by acquisitions and higher consumption, but net income fell by 48.9% to $3.0 million, or $0.11 per share. This profit drop was attributed to a substantial $67.3 million capital improvement program which led to increased depreciation, interest expense, and asset disposal losses. Despite the earnings decline, the company maintained its monthly dividend and is pursuing rate cases in Arizona to improve future revenue.

feed.title: Tapestry (TPR) VP Manesh Dadlani sells 975 common shares
feed.summary: Tapestry, Inc.'s VP, Controller, and Principal Accounting Officer, Manesh Dadlani, sold 975 shares of common stock at $156.05 per share on March 3, 2026. This transaction reduces his direct holdings to 17,500 common shares and is considered to have a moderate impact with a negative sentiment. The sale was reported via an SEC Form 4 filing.

feed.title: [144] IDEX CORP /DE/ SEC Filing
feed.summary: This article details an SEC Form 144 filing by IDEX Corp /DE/, indicating a proposed sale of securities from a stock option exercise. The filing, dated March 4, 2026, involves the sale of 4309 common shares with an aggregate market value of $880,817.77 through UBS Financial Services Inc. The securities were acquired on March 3, 2026, via stock option exercise from the issuer.

feed.title: Newmont (NEM) executive Rodgers sells 1,361 shares in 10b5-1 trade
feed.summary: Newmont Corporation executive Mark C. Rodgers, Managing Director for Africa-Asia Pacific, sold 1,361 shares of Newmont common stock on March 3, 2026, at an average price of $120.78 per share. This transaction was conducted under a pre-established Rule 10b5-1 trading plan dated November 24, 2025, indicating it was pre-arranged. Following the sale, Rodgers directly owns 25,756 shares of Newmont common stock.

feed.title: ProShares UltraPro QQQ ETF Options Spot-On: On March 4th, 292.39K Contracts Were Traded, With 1.49 Million Open Interest
feed.summary: This article reports on the trading activity of the ProShares UltraPro QQQ ETF options. On March 4th, 292.39 thousand contracts were traded, and the open interest reached 1.49 million contracts.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley Smith Barney files Form 144 for PEP (NASDAQ: PEP) — 2702 shares
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley Smith Barney LLC Executive Financial Services filed a Form 144 to report the proposed sale of 2702 shares of PepsiCo Inc. (NASDAQ: PEP) common stock. These shares are the result of restricted stock vesting under a registered plan dated February 27, 2022. The filing, recorded on March 4, 2026, is administrative and indicates a neutral impact and sentiment.

feed.title: Entergy (ETR) director granted 217 shares under company stock program
feed.summary: Entergy Corp. director Stuart L. Levenick was granted 217 shares of Entergy common stock under the company's Director Stock Program. This transaction, awarded at no stated purchase price, increased his direct holdings to 46,130 shares. The Form 4 filing indicates a neutral impact and sentiment regarding this insider transaction.

feed.title: Arizona water utility pours $67M into upgrades, cutting 2025 profit
feed.summary: Global Water Resources (NASDAQ: GWRS) reported a 5.8% increase in 2025 revenue to $55.8 million, but net income dropped 48.9% to $3.0 million ($0.11/share) due to significant investments. The company invested $67.3 million in infrastructure, acquired seven Tucson water systems, and secured a $15 million term loan, with management noting that these capital-intensive initiatives are crucial for long-term value despite impacting short-term profitability.

feed.title: Western Digital Corp. stock underperforms Wednesday when compared to competitors despite daily gains
feed.summary: Western Digital Corp. (WDC) stock advanced 4.27% on Wednesday, closing at $261.30. Despite this daily gain, the stock underperformed compared to its competitors, even as the broader market, including the S&P 500 and Dow Jones Industrial Average, saw positive movement. The rise broke a four-day losing streak for the company's shares.

feed.title: S&P 500 zero-day options hit 3M contracts a day at Cboe
feed.summary: Cboe Global Markets reported record trading volumes for February 2026 across its global business lines, particularly driven by index products, equities, and FX. Key highlights include a record average daily volume (ADV) of 6.0 million proprietary index options contracts, with S&P 500 (SPX) zero-days-to-expiry (0DTE) options reaching a record 3.0 million contracts, representing 63% of all SPX trading. Additionally, U.S. on-exchange equities saw a 17.2% year-over-year increase, and Cboe Europe achieved a record average daily notional value (ADNV) of €18.0 billion.

feed.title: Booking Holdings (NASDAQ: BKNG) HR chief logs stock awards and tax withholdings
feed.summary: Booking Holdings Inc.'s HR chief, Paulo Pisano, reported recent stock transactions, including receiving 2,290 shares through a grant on March 2, 2026, and an additional 602 shares on March 4, 2026, from achieved performance share units. The transactions also involved tax-withholding dispositions of 1,114 and 236 shares related to the vesting of performance and restricted stock units, respectively. Following these activities, Pisano directly owns 3,056 shares of Booking Holdings common stock.

feed.title: Booking Holdings (NASDAQ: BKNG) GC gets stock awards, withholds shares for tax
feed.summary: Booking Holdings Inc.'s Executive Vice President and General Counsel, Peter J. Millones, recently received equity awards and had shares withheld for tax obligations. On March 2, 2026, he acquired 4,294 shares and on March 4, 2026, an additional 722 restricted stock units. Simultaneously, 1,950 and 333 shares were withheld on March 4, 2026, to cover tax liabilities associated with the vesting of performance share units and restricted stock units, respectively.

feed.title: Hagerty (HGTY) director purchases 15,000 Class A common shares
feed.summary: Hagerty, Inc. director Anthony J. Kuczinski recently purchased 15,000 shares of the company’s Class A common stock on the open market. The transaction, executed at a weighted average price of $10.72 per share, increased his direct holdings to 43,277 shares. This insider trade is considered a positive signal for the company.

feed.title: Xcel Energy (XEL) SVP Melissa Ostrom receives 1,450-share RSU award
feed.summary: Xcel Energy Inc.'s Senior Vice President and Controller, Melissa Ostrom, was granted 1,450 restricted stock units (RSUs) on March 2, 2026. These RSUs are scheduled to vest on December 31, 2028, converting into shares if her employment continues. The filing also indicates that Ostrom indirectly holds 403.981 shares in the Xcel Energy Stock Fund through the company’s 401(k) savings plan.

feed.title: Akamai Technologies (NASDAQ: AKAM) lists planned insider sales of 13,550 shares
feed.summary: Akamai Technologies, Inc. (NASDAQ: AKAM) has filed a Form 144 notice detailing proposed insider sales totaling 13,550 shares. These planned dispositions are tied to equity compensation lapses occurring on various dates in February and March 2025. The filing is a routine regulatory notice of intended sales and does not represent completed transactions.

feed.title: HSIC (NASDAQ: HSIC) brokered Form 144 lists 5,295 vested shares for potential resale
feed.summary: Henry Schein, Inc. (HSIC) has filed a Form 144 notice indicating the proposed resale of 5,295 common shares. These shares are tied to restricted stock vesting, with 556 shares from March 2024 and 4,739 shares from March 2025. Fidelity Brokerage Services LLC is named as the broker for these potential transactions.

feed.title: Director at Entergy (ETR) receives 217-share stock award
feed.summary: Entergy Corporation director M. Elise Hyland was granted 217 shares of common stock at a price of $0.00 per share under the company's Director Stock Program. Following this award, Hyland directly holds 18,290 shares, which includes 113 shares accumulated through Entergy's dividend reinvestment plan. This transaction was reported in an SEC Form 4 filing.

feed.title: GE HealthCare (GEHC) GC Jimenez granted options and RSUs in new award
feed.summary: GE HealthCare Technologies Inc.'s General Counsel, Frank R. Jimenez, received new equity awards comprising 28,697 employee stock options and 10,915 restricted stock units. Both awards have a similar vesting schedule, with portions vesting annually from September 2027 to September 2029. Following these transactions, Jimenez directly holds 28,697 employee stock options and 92,182 shares of common stock.

feed.title: Stanley Black & Decker WARN Act Investigation
feed.summary: Strauss Borrelli PLLC is investigating Stanley Black & Decker for a potential WARN Act violation following a mass layoff of 300 employees in New Britain, Connecticut. The law firm believes the employees may be entitled to 60 days of severance pay and benefits if the company failed to provide the required 60-day notice. The WARN Act mandates employers provide advance notice for significant layoffs or plant closings to allow employees time to prepare for job loss.

feed.title: Analog Devices (ADI) director Ray Stata exercises options and sells 1,226 shares
feed.summary: Analog Devices director Ray Stata reported exercising options for 7,640 shares at $54.93 per share and subsequently selling 1,226 common shares at $339.15 per share. After these transactions, Stata directly holds 127,110 common shares and indirectly holds 652,221 shares through his spouse. The filing notes the exercised option was fully vested.

feed.title: GE HealthCare (GEHC) CTO awarded stock options and RSUs vesting through 2029
feed.summary: GE HealthCare's Chief Technology Officer, Taha Kass-Hout, was granted an employee stock option for 34,847 shares and a restricted stock unit (RSU) award of 13,254 shares on March 2, 2026. These equity awards will vest in stages from September 2, 2027, through September 2, 2029. The filing, a Form 4, indicates these are acquisitions of equity and not open-market purchases or sales.

feed.title: Xcel Energy (XEL) CFO receives 9,129 restricted stock units in grant
feed.summary: Xcel Energy's EVP and CFO, Brian J. Van Abel, was granted 9,129 restricted stock units on March 2, 2026, which will vest on December 31, 2028, converting into common shares upon continued employment. This award increases his direct ownership to 110,697.05 shares, with an additional 16.22 shares held indirectly through the company's 401(k) plan. This transaction is classified as neutral in impact and sentiment according to the SEC Form 4 filing.

feed.title: Charles River Laboratories: Is Wall Street Underpricing This Quiet Biotech Enabler?
feed.summary: Charles River Laboratories (CRL) is gaining renewed analyst attention amidst reassessments of drug-development demand and GLP-1 exposure. The company provides essential preclinical and early-stage development services, making it a leveraged play on the broader biopharma R&D landscape. Investors are currently weighing regulatory scrutiny, biopharma spending trends, and GLP-1 enthusiasm, leading to volatility but potentially opening opportunities for long-term investors.
